headline: Alexandria Real Estate Equities Deepens Veteran Support As Shares Screen Undervalued
summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) has deepened its partnership with the Navy SEAL Foundation, focusing on veterans' health and recovery programs. The company is providing funding and leadership support for the Foundation's Warrior Fitness Program, aimed at supporting physical and mental well-being for Navy SEALs and their families. This corporate social responsibility effort highlights Alexandria's engagement with veteran communities beyond its core real estate operations. For...
